2294720.name: Land Drifters
2294720.description:
Land Drifters is a game about exploring new islands, leveling up new skills, and unlocks through progression!

The world is set in a medieval-style setting with many trade-skills to help you progress through the game. Mine precious ore and craft your strongest armor, battle against monsters to unlock new areas to explore. Claim your ship and set sail and drift to new lands to uncover their story with plenty of mysteries to uncover!

Lots of skills and tons of masteries to level up. Whether fishing mighty beasts, working with specific metals in smithing, honing your swordsmanship, or obtaining poison resistance through exposure, there will be a lot for you to enjoy and progress.

There are also plenty of side activities to unlock and keep you busy if you choose while you make progress. Claim rewards with an optional cosmetic currency you earn to spend in the game. Many of these activities range from fun games that challenge you in many ways, like speed, spatial memory, language, and more.

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
